atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 theme configuration block. Define custom design tokens like colors, spacing, fonts, etc.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 custom utility directive. Create custom utility classes with standard CSS.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 custom variant directive. Create custom state variants like hover, focus, etc.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 source directive. Specify additional source files to scan for class names.
